text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I was asked to help clean up the<n>school pool, so I
head there to find...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we're in charge of the poolside<n>area. Let's
get to work.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, before we begin, a suggestion.<n>How about I
just take care of the pool<n>itself?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The whole pool? Wouldn't that be a<n>lot to handle
by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hah, for one such as me? No way!<n>Just leave it
to me, all right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(So... she thinks she's good at<n>cleaning too,
huh?)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (She can run, study, and clean?And I thought I was the modelstudent!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll do all of the poolside, then!<n>Everyone
else, please clean the diving<n>boards and such!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (I'm definitely going to finish before<n>her!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (Which means I can't waste time! I'llhave to be thorough andefficient!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's the last of the kickboards. I<n>should clean
the lane ropes while I'm<n>at it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I forgot the chlorine. I should get<n>that first.
Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Seems like Tachyon is way behind. In<n>fact, it
looks like she's making even<n>more of a mess...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she's thinking, but<n>I better
hurry and finish while I have a<n>chance!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hah, I'm done! Hehe, looks like I win<n>with plenty
of time to spare!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Doing it quickly and efficiently<n>worked! And it
looks like Tachyon still<n>has a lot more to do.
Which means...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tachyon! I just finished, so I'll<n>come help
you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Finished, are you? Same as me, then.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Same as you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, take a look.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon takes a test tube<n>from her
pocket and dumps the<n>contents into the pool.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! All the dirt from the<n>pool... is
floating to the surface?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's the results of my latest<n>research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seemed promising for cleaning and<n>disinfecting,
so I figured I could try it<n>out as a pool cleaner.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, all I have to do is drain the water<n>and all the
dirt will go along with it.<n>I've also gone and
sterilized the<n>kickboards as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, it looks like my hypothesis was<n>correct. I'll
be leaving now.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why do I feel like I've lost?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon is truly amazing! But I'm not<n>gonna let
this stand!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat her one of these<n>days!
